name: Dalafri
short_description: This title is a physics-based 3D sword fighting game. They fight against warriors with flexible bodies to become champions of the arena.
detailed_description:
This title is a physics-based 3D sword fighting game.

They fight against warriors with flexible bodies to become champions of the arena.

  • Players: 1-8

  • Game distribution/monetization: OK

What is Dalafri?

Warriors who use their flexible bodies to fight are called “dalafri.

Dalafri controls his body, which is shaken by movement and other factors, to attack and guard.

Fighting in the arena

In the arena, the survivor is the winner. Use a variety of weapons such as swords, shields, spears, and dumbbells to win.

Weapon Combinations

The right hand and left hand can be equipped with different weapons.

You can fight freely by changing the combination, such as equipping a sword and shield to balance offense and defense, or equipping both hands with spears to keep the enemy at bay.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
